chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1256 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case 28-02-2025 Mr. Khadim Hussain Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Asim Iqbal Advocate for the Respondent No.2 and 3 Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Present petition seeks reliefs against a public listed entity which could not be justified per Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Even otherwise, the subject matter raises factual controversy which could not be addressed without inquiry, investigation, recording of evidence etc. it is also not articulated as to why initial recourse was not taken before the competent authority. In view of foregoing, the petition is found to be misconceived and dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
